**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/compare/0.17.1...0.17.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* chore(deps-dev): bump the all-dependencies group with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/206
* Add eslint-plugin-obsidianmd for plugin submission compliance by @forketyfork in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/208
* chore(deps-dev): bump the all-dependencies group with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/211
* chore(deps): bump tar from 7.5.7 to 7.5.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/212
* Fix filename handling for percent signs and non-German diacritics by @forketyfork in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/215
* v0.16.2 by @forketyfork in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/216


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/compare/0.16.1...0.16.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes a regression in v0.16.0 when installing the plugin the first time: #186

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's Changed * Add markdown link support for food parsing in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/168 * Add custom metadata field names in https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/pull/160 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/forketyfork/obsidian-food-tracker/compare/0.15.2...0.16.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed the cache update after nutrient metadata update.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: The daily stats are now preserved and updated in the frontmatter, so you can use other plugins for data analysis visualization.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added `brand`, `barcode` and `url` fields to the nutrient frontmatter, populated from OpenFoodFacts on import.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Users can now search OpenFoodFacts by barcode as well as by name using the same search field.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed #123: wikilink aliases are now supported for nutrient file names, e.g. `#food [[bread|Slice]] 30g`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: You can now specify a custom format for daily notes. Notes matching this format will be used to gather the statistics. The default format is YYYY-MM-DD.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: In the calorie stats, "Remaining" now shows negative values.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now it's possible to track saturated fats with `satfat` records. OpenFoodFacts integration also supports importing saturated fats value.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Values are highlighted and calorie hints are now visible in the view mode as well.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed an issue where the new calorie tooltip wasn't visible when no workout records were logged.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: The calories tooltip now shows a detailed breakdown.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added inline calories hints for every entry. The hints can be disabled in the settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added the possibility to specify workouts that are deducted from the total calorie count. You can do this in 2 ways, whatever's more convenient for you:
- with a special `#workout` tag: `#workout running 200kcal`
- with `#food` tag, using a negative calorie value: `#food workout running -200kcal`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: A simple monthly nutrition statistics modal window.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now serving_size is assumed 100g by default; the nutrient modal doesn't allow to specify a non-positive value.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now it's possible to specify `serving_size` for the nutrient and refer to it by just specifying `1pc` in the food record instead of the grams.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: UX improvements for mobile.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Support for mobile devices.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- fixed code review issues
- the highlighting is now properly applied during scrolling
- the folder and file selection in the settings now has autocomplete

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fixed an issue with incorrect highlighting of lines like `#food Chicken 200g`;
- German letters ü, ö, ä and ß are now transliterated in filenames.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Removing innerHTML and improving HTML generation and custom icon handling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixed the totals panel not loading properly when first opening Obsidian.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added fiber and sodium to the list of highlighted, suggested and tracked values.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Added borders to the total bar items.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Marked the plugin as desktop only, cleaned up the description.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Some color improvements; the percentage in totals tooltips can now be more than 100%.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: This is the first release with the basic features: tracking daily goals, adding nutrients with database search.
